overall.description: Third-person gameplay from a Japanese horror game featuring a schoolgirl in uniform exploring a dimly lit abandoned school building. The character moves through wooden classrooms and hallways, encountering a hostile ghostly creature in the corridor while armed with a metal pipe.

events.description: character slides open the wooden door and exits the classroom into the hallway

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit classroom toward the exit while holding a metal pipe weapon

entered.detail: grid-style windows on the far wall showing overcast sky outside
scattered wooden desks and chairs throughout the room
wall-mounted notice board with papers attached
stacked cardboard boxes in the corner

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit abandoned classroom with wooden floors and scattered desks. The character, a schoolgirl holding a weapon, walks steadily toward the exit. Multi-paned windows on the far wall provide faint grey light, while bulletin boards and stacked boxes fill the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark wooden school hallway with lockers and doorways

events.description: entered the narrow corridor from the classroom, wooden lockers visible on the left
ghostly creature with pale face and dark hair emerges from doorway on the right and lunges toward the character

agents.ego_description: proceeding cautiously down the dark corridor, passing the hostile entity without engaging

notable_agents.action: monstrous ghostly figure emerging from a classroom doorway and reaching toward the protagonist

entered.detail: tall wooden locker cabinets lining the left wall of the hallway
sliding wooden doors leading to other classrooms along the right side
white bucket or plant pot on a small wooden stand
old fluorescent light fixtures on the corridor ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a narrow, dark hallway lined with wooden lockers on the left and classroom doors on the right. At approximately 8.5 seconds, a terrifying ghostly creature emerges from a doorway on the right, lunging toward the character as she passes by. The corridor is dimly lit by overhead fixtures, with a potted plant visible on a stand.

scene_state.functional_zone: classroom with arranged desks and large windows

events.description: entered the second classroom through the sliding wooden doors
character stops walking and turns to face the blackboard, observing the chalk writing

agents.ego_description: moving between rows of desks toward the front of the classroom, examining the blackboard with Japanese writing and drawings

entered.detail: tall multi-paned windows on the right wall allowing grey natural light to enter
neatly arranged rows of wooden student desks and chairs
large blackboard at the front of the classroom with chalk writing
round clock mounted on the wall above the blackboard
wooden desk positioned at the front near the blackboard

segments.scene_description: The character enters a second classroom with large grid windows on the right wall illuminating rows of neatly arranged desks. She walks between the desks toward the front where a blackboard displays Japanese writing and a chalk drawing. Near the end of the segment, she stops and turns to examine the blackboard more closely, revealing a wall clock and framed pictures above it.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cluttered, dimly lit classroom through a menacing corridor and into a more orderly study space. It begins with the schoolgirl walking across wooden floors past scattered desks and bulletin boards toward the exit. As she steps into a narrow, dark hallway lined with wooden lockers, a ghostly creature suddenly lunges from a doorway to intercept her path. The scene then shifts as she escapes the corridor and enters a second classroom, where the lighting brightens through large grid windows illuminating rows of neat desks. Finally, the camera follows her to the front of the room, where she stops to examine a blackboard covered in Japanese writing and chalk drawings beneath a wall clock.
